title: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on a baroque works pair attacks, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Baroque Works Pair Attacks. The separate fights across Alubarna intensify while the bomb plot and the civil war continue moving forward. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: PIRAKING! Hahaha! Piking! Hahaha! PK! Hahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You should never again babble about something so stupid out here in the Grand Line!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Honestly, for god's sake! Deluded idiots like him are better off dead!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Time for you to die too, long nose!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: PUNHAB... A JANSIN HELL... QB WINN!... (don't have a chance in hell of winning)

summary: This part develops a baroque works pair attacks and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
